channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Court Releases Protesters Arrested During Nairobi Fuel Price Demonstrations
item.description: A Nairobi court has released activist Julius Kamau together with nine other individuals who had been arrested during a disrupted fuel price protest in the city centre. Each of them was granted bail of...

item.title: Northern Kenya PWD Leaders Demand Inclusion in Government Appointments and Support Services
item.description: Leaders of people with disabilities (PWDs) in Northern Kenya have raised concerns over being sidelined in government appointments and political nominations. Hafid Maalim Ibrahim, chairman of PWDs in t...

item.title: Majority of MOI patients treated due to road traffic accidents, study shows
item.description: According to a recent study from the Muhimbili Orthopaedic and Neurosurgical Institute (MOI) in Tanzania, road traffic accidents continue to dominate hospital admissions, making up about 60 to 62 perc...

item.title: Atiku Urges Caution on Sokoto-Badagry Highway Loan Request
item.description: Former Vice-President Atiku Abubakar don express serious concern over President Bola Ahmed Tinubu request wey dey for Senate approval to get another $516 million foreign loan to fund parts of the Soko...

item.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5, enhancing AI capabilities and moving toward multi-purpose application
item.description: OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5, its latest AI model, which the company describes as its most intuitive and capable model to date. According to OpenAI co-founder and president Greg Brockman, GPT-5.5 advan...

item.title: TCDC convenes stakeholders meeting to address governance and integrity issues in Tanzania's cooperative societies
item.description: The Tanzania Cooperative Development Commission (TCDC) is taking serious steps to rebuild public confidence in the country's cooperative societies following ongoing worries about ethics, accountabilit...

item.title: Disability Advocates Express Concerns Over NDIS Reforms by Health Minister Mark Butler
item.description: Disability advocates have voiced strong concerns following Health Minister Mark Butler’s announcement of significant reforms to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS). The Albanese government...

item.title: The 10 Most Populous Tribes in Kenya and Their Estimated Population in 2026
item.description: Kenya is home to a rich diversity of tribes, with the Kikuyu, Luhya, Kalenjin, Luo, and Kamba communities being the largest. According to the 2019 population census, Kenya's total population stands at...

item.title: ICC Confirms Jurisdiction and Trial of Duterte Amid Wider Philippine Political Tensions
item.description: The article reports that the International Criminal Court (ICC) has firmly decided it has jurisdiction over former Philippine president Rodrigo Duterte’s case related to alleged crimes against humanit...

item.title: Three men convicted for rape on Brighton beach
item.description: Three men have been found guilty of raping a woman on Brighton beach in October in what the court described as a 'cynical, predatory and callous attack'. The convicted individuals, Abdulla Ahmadi, 26,...

item.title: Pope Leo's Africa tour concludes with a prison visit following political tensions with Trump
item.description: Pope Leo has wrapped up a significant and eventful tour of Africa with a visit to a prison, following a highly publicized exchange of words with former U.S. President Donald Trump. The Pope's visit to...

item.title: 232 youngsters participate in SAAP district football trials in Visakhapatnam
item.description: Visakhapatnam has recorded the highest participation in Andhra Pradesh during the district-level selections for the Sports Authority of Andhra Pradesh (SAAP) football league, with a total of 232 young...

item.title: 20 Chinese Nationals Arrested in Davao for Illegal Mining and Smuggling Activities
item.description: In a joint operation by the Bureau of Immigration (BI) and the Army's 10th Infantry Division, 20 Chinese nationals were arrested in Davao de Oro and Davao del Norte. The raid uncovered an illegal mini...

item.title: Alphabet Lane Explores Isolation and Psychological Collapse in Rural Australia
item.description: Alphabet Lane, directed by James Litchfield, is a psychological thriller that deconstructs the romanticised notion of rural life in Australia. The film follows Jack (Nicholas Denton) and Anna (Tilda C...

item.title: TTCL achieves profitability after major operational and financial restructuring
item.description: The Tanzania Telecommunications Corporation Limited (TTCL), a fully government-owned telecom company, has reported a significant financial turnaround after years of losses. In an interview, Director G...

item.title: French Government Agency Managing Citizen IDs Reports Data Breach
item.description: The French government agency responsible for issuing and managing citizens' identity documents, including national IDs, passports, and immigration records, has confirmed a data breach. The Agence Nati...

item.title: Japan Advances Undersea Mining to Reduce Dependence on Chinese Rare Earths
item.description: Japan is making a strategic push to reduce its dependence on Chinese rare earths by developing one of the world's most promising underwater deposits near the remote atoll of Minamitorishima. Situated ...

item.title: WestJet hikes baggage fees again as rising fuel costs drive airline price increases
item.description: WestJet has announced another increase to its checked baggage fees, marking the third hike in three years and following a similar move by Air Canada earlier in April 2026. The new pricing applies to b...

item.title: Teacher Cillah Reflects on Njugush and Wakavinye's Impact on Her Life Following Their Breakup
item.description: Teacher Cillah has opened up about the emotional impact of comedian Njugush and his wife Celestine Ndinda, better known as Wakavinye, on her life after their recent split. Njugush announced the separa...

item.title: My Obsession with The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: 15 Seasons in Under a Year
item.description: In less than a year, the author binge-watched all 15 seasons of *The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills*, equating to around 250 hours of reality television. This addiction to the series, filled with dr...
